name: EclParIPMFC_15
comment: EclPar IPMFC is a flexible IP rated single source LED spotlight, featuring an 100W RGB+WarmWhite light source with high efficiency and advanced colour control. Its Spektra calibrated LED source delivers a high-quality white reproduction with high CRI and TM30 with an advanced control over colours, ensuring consistency across fixtures.

capabilities.comment: Dynamic - Max Power according with temperature

gwSpecs.description: EclPar IPMFC is a flexible IP rated single source LED spotlight, featuring an 100W RGB+WarmWhite light source with high efficiency and advanced colour control. Its Spektra calibrated LED source delivers a high-quality white reproduction with high CRI and TM30 with an advanced control over colours, ensuring consistency across fixtures.

revision.text: Rev 015 - as FW 1_1_04_0 - Added ColorMacro User Preset features
